title: Providers monitoring
description: Per-leader provider performance from ClickHouse fec_stats: shred timing (first/decode/last delay vs baseline provider), winrate, invalid/missed/duplicated shreds, unreconstructable FEC sets, pairwise comparison, and database health. Slot->time from slot_timings; leaders from leader_schedule/validators; provider names from the local providers table (seeded from SHRED_PROVIDERS).

list.name: metric
list.label: Metric
list.query: First shred : first_ns,Decode : decode_ns,Last shred : last_ns

query.rawSql: SELECT name FROM (SELECT argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) AS leader FROM leader_schedule ls LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey ORDER BY leader

panels.title: p50 delay — ${metric:text}
panels.description: Median signed delay vs the baseline provider for the selected stage. Rows = leaders, columns = providers. Green = faster (more negative), red = slower. Baseline provider column is ~0.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, toInt64(quantile(0.5)(${metric})) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: p99 delay — ${metric:text}
panels.description: 99th-percentile signed delay vs baseline for the selected stage. Green = faster, red = slower.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, toInt64(quantile(0.99)(${metric})) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Winrate — ${metric:text}
panels.description: Per leader, share of co-observed FEC sets where the provider had the smallest delay for the selected stage. Green = wins more on that leader. Each leader row sums to ~100% across providers.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  ),
  sets AS (
    SELECT slot, fec_set_index, any(leader) AS leader, argMin(provider, ${metric}) AS winner
    FROM base WHERE ${metric} IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY slot, fec_set_index
  )
SELECT leader, winner AS provider, round(count() * 100.0 / sum(count()) OVER (PARTITION BY leader), 1) AS value
FROM sets GROUP BY leader, winner ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Winrate per leader — provider share
panels.description: Each leader's bar is the provider mix of first-shred wins; segments sum to 100%.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  ),
  sets AS (
    SELECT slot, fec_set_index, any(leader) AS leader, argMin(provider, first_ns) AS winner
    FROM base WHERE first_ns IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY slot, fec_set_index
  )
SELECT leader, winner AS provider,
       round(count() * 100.0 / sum(count()) OVER (PARTITION BY leader), 2) AS "winrate"
FROM sets GROUP BY leader, winner ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Invalid shreds
panels.description: Total invalid shreds (failed structural/version/merkle checks). Rows=leaders, cols=providers. Green=fewer, red=more.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, sum(invalid_shreds) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Missed shreds
panels.description: Total expected-but-undelivered shreds per FEC set. Green=fewer, red=more.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, sum(missed_shreds) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Invalid FEC sets
panels.description: Count of (slot, fec, provider) rows where the FEC set could not be reconstructed/validated. Green=fewer, red=more.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, countIf(is_valid = 0) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Duplicated shreds
panels.description: Total duplicated shreds received. Green=fewer, red=more.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT leader, provider, sum(duplicated_shreds) AS value
FROM base GROUP BY leader, provider ORDER BY leader, provider

panels.title: Storage — ClickHouse data vs disk
panels.description: clickhouse_data = size of ClickHouse table data (system.parts). disk_* = the whole filesystem ClickHouse is stored on (includes everything on that disk, not just ClickHouse) — so a high disk_used_pct usually reflects other data on the host, not ClickHouse.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT formatReadableSize(sum(bytes_on_disk)) FROM system.parts WHERE active) AS clickhouse_data, formatReadableSize(total_space - free_space) AS disk_used, formatReadableSize(free_space) AS disk_free, formatReadableSize(total_space) AS disk_total, round((total_space - free_space) * 100.0 / total_space, 1) AS disk_used_pct FROM system.disks ORDER BY total_space DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Pairwise matrix — A vs B
panels.description: Directional comparison over FEC sets observed by BOTH providers. a_winrate_% = share of co-sets where A's first shred beat B's. avg/p50/p99 are stats of (A_first - B_first) ns: negative = A faster.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), substring(coalesce(ls.leader_pubkey, 'unknown'), 1, 8)) AS leader,
      p.name AS provider,
      f.fec_first_shred_delay_ns AS first_ns,
      f.fec_decode_delay_ns      AS decode_ns,
      f.fec_last_shred_delay_ns  AS last_ns,
      f.invalid_shreds AS invalid_shreds, f.missed_shreds AS missed_shreds, f.duplicated_shreds AS duplicated_shreds, f.is_valid AS is_valid,
      f.slot AS slot, f.fec_set_index AS fec_set_index
    FROM fec_stats f
    INNER JOIN (SELECT slot, min(seen_at) AS seen_at FROM slot_timings GROUP BY slot) st ON st.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN leader_schedule ls ON ls.slot = f.slot
    LEFT JOIN validators v ON v.pubkey = ls.leader_pubkey
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, argMax(name, updated_at) AS name FROM providers GROUP BY id) p ON p.id = f.provider_id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(st.seen_at)
      AND p.name IS NOT NULL
      AND ('__all__' IN (${provider:singlequote}) OR p.name IN (${provider:singlequote}))
      AND ('__all__' IN (${leader:singlequote}) OR coalesce(nullIf(v.name, ''), ls.leader_pubkey) IN (${leader:singlequote}))
  )
SELECT a.provider AS provider_a, b.provider AS provider_b,
       count() AS co_sets,
       round(countIf(a.first_ns < b.first_ns) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS "a_winrate_%",
       toInt64(avg(a.first_ns - b.first_ns)) AS "avg_a_minus_b_ns",
       toInt64(quantile(0.5)(a.first_ns - b.first_ns)) AS "p50_a_minus_b_ns",
       toInt64(quantile(0.99)(a.first_ns - b.first_ns)) AS "p99_a_minus_b_ns"
FROM base a
INNER JOIN base b ON a.slot = b.slot AND a.fec_set_index = b.fec_set_index
WHERE a.provider < b.provider AND a.first_ns IS NOT NULL AND b.first_ns IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY provider_a, provider_b
ORDER BY provider_a, provider_b
